final:
module counter(input clk, input reset, input en, output reg [3:0] count);

	always @(posedge clk) begin
		if (reset) begin
			count <= 0;
		end
		else if (en) begin
			count <= count + 1;
		end
	end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (reset) begin
        count <= 4'b1111;
      end
      else if (!en) begin
        count <= count - 1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
